notes: Items on Nicola's Friday. The reservation book at the maître d' stand, the candy dish from 1971, the water pitcher at the bar, the apron's pockets — and the envelope Dante sends down for the hard scenario.

the_reservation_book.title: Reservation Book · Friday
the_reservation_book.flavor: The leather-bound book in your hand. Names in your handwriting going back six weeks. The cancellation in the wife's name. The penciled-in regular at table 12.

the_candy_dish_from_1971.title: Candy Dish · 1971
the_candy_dish_from_1971.flavor: The dish at the stand. Hard candies that have been in it since Dante's father. Butterscotch on top, peppermint underneath. Somehow always restocked.

the_apron_pocket.title: The Apron Pocket
the_apron_pocket.flavor: The pocket of the apron Dante had embroidered with the boat's monogram in '23. Holds: pens, a folded reservation card, the small notebook you write checks in.

the_water_pitcher.title: Water Pitcher
the_water_pitcher.flavor: Sammy's. Refilled before you ask. The pitcher has a small chip at the base he claims is from '01. He is, you have learned, lying about the chip — it is from '04, you broke it, and Sammy has, in twenty years, never asked you about it.

the_intercom.title: The Intercom · Behind the Bar
the_intercom.flavor: The brass speaker box. The button you press to talk to the helm. Sammy lets you use it without watching you do it.

the_friday_ticket_spike.title: Ticket Spike · Friday Night
the_friday_ticket_spike.flavor: The pile of tickets in the order Hector punched them. The pile is the kind of pile that means service is going the way service is supposed to go.

the_garnish_hector_did.title: Hector's Friday Garnish
the_garnish_hector_did.flavor: Hector has, tonight, garnished the soft-shells with three sprigs of dill in a way that the soft-shells are not normally garnished on a Friday. Nobody but you will notice.

the_folded_note.title: Folded Note · 'When you're ready'
the_folded_note.flavor: A square of folded notepaper from Table 14. Handwriting you do not recognize. On the inside: When you're ready. Below it, a phone number with a 504 area code.

the_hundred_dollar_bill.title: $100 Bill · weighted on the note
the_hundred_dollar_bill.flavor: A hundred-dollar bill from Table 14, weighted on top of the folded note. Mr. Dean paid for nothing.

the_envelope_from_the_helm.title: Envelope · from the Helm
the_envelope_from_the_helm.flavor: A sealed envelope Dante handed you at the stand. Wax seal. No name on the front. Dante said: catering office. He did not, today, say more.

the_october_wedding_contract.title: Contract · October Wedding · Port Arthur
the_october_wedding_contract.flavor: The three-hundred-plate contract for an October wedding in Port Arthur. The bride's father is somebody Dante did business with in '88. The deposit is in the catering office safe.
